overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage beginning with first-person driving through a covered urban street at night, transitioning to third-person perspective as the character exits the vehicle and walks through a dense street protest with burning barrels and sign-waving crowds, then turns onto a neon-lit sidewalk lined with holographic billboards.

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered urban street lined with palm trees and parked vehicles. The concrete overpass creates a sheltered corridor with artificial lighting. As the vehicle approaches the end of the covered section, police vehicles with flashing lights become visible blocking the road ahead, and the vehicle slows to a stop.

scene_state.functional_zone: street protest with barricades and burning barrels

events.description: perspective shifts from first-person driving to third-person following character exiting vehicle
entering dense crowd of protesters holding signs and banners

agents.ego_description: walking through dense crowd of protesters holding signs reading THE END IS NEAR

protester with red hair holding large cardboard sign

entered.detail: dense group of protesters holding signs and banners
concrete barriers and yellow caution tape blocking the street
cardboard signs with text including THE END IS NEAR

segments.scene_description: The perspective shifts to third-person as the character exits the vehicle and walks into a dense street protest. Protesters hold signs reading THE END IS NEAR while standing near burning barrels and concrete barricades. The crowd is thick in the center of the street, and police vehicles are now visible to the left as the character moves past them.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown sidewalk with neon advertising and police presence

events.description: character turns left onto sidewalk away from the main protest area
moving from protest zone to open city sidewalk with passing traffic and bright neon billboards

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk past parked police cars and neon billboards

police car parked on sidewalk with flashing red lights

entered.detail: wide pedestrian walkway with concrete tiles
large illuminated sign reading MASALA STUDIOS
tall structure with multiple holographic advertisements and green neon accents
NCPD police vehicle parked on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: Turning left onto the sidewalk, the character leaves the protest behind and walks along a neon-lit downtown street. The MASALA STUDIOS sign glows brightly on the right, while holographic billboards illuminate the scene with green and purple light. A police car is parked on the sidewalk to the left, and sparse pedestrian traffic walks in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous progression from a sheltered urban drive into the chaotic heart of a street protest, finally settling into a neon-lit downtown corridor. It begins with a first-person perspective driving through a covered concrete street lined with palm trees and parked cars, slowing to a halt as flashing police lights appear at the end of the corridor. As the perspective shifts to third-person, the character exits the vehicle and pushes into a dense crowd of protesters waving signs and gathering around burning barrels and concrete barricades. The scene then shifts as the character turns left away from the commotion, moving onto a sidewalk where the atmosphere transforms into a vibrant cityscape of green and purple holographic billboards. Finally, the camera follows the character past a parked police car and the glowing Masala Studios sign, blending into the sparse pedestrian traffic of the neon-lit district.
